channel.title: Amal Yadav — Blog
channel.description: Thoughts on AI, music, gaming, and building things — by Amal Yadav.

item.title: Running Llama 3 Locally on a Budget PC
item.description: You don't need a $3,000 GPU to run a 9-billion parameter model. I've been testing Llama 3 on mid-range hardware with Ollama and the results are surprisingly usable. Quantisation is the key — a Q4 model fits in 6 GB of RAM and still produces coherent, useful output for automation tasks.

item.title: Why I Built an AI Journal
item.description: Journaling has always helped me think clearly, but I wanted something that could help me go deeper. That's why I built AI Journal — an app where the AI doesn't write for you, it helps you reflect on what you've already written.

item.title: What Pokemon Unite Taught Me About Strategy
item.description: MOBAs are essentially real-time decision engines. Every match in Pokemon Unite is a series of trade-offs: push a lane or contest an objective? Farm or fight? The same mental models apply to engineering.
